title: Nark Corpus Benchmark Metadata
description: Per-rule precision/recall metrics for the corpus, produced by the mutation harness (Wave 2) and gold-benchmark upload (post-step-7 labeling). File is populated over time; unmeasured rules pass by default per work-packages/accuracy-roadmap/0002-ci-gate-spec.md Section 6a Q3.

$schema.description: JSON Schema $schema URI or relative path to this schema file.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this metadata file was generated. Null until first run of the mutation harness or gold-benchmark upload.

generated_from.description: Human-readable label for the pipeline that produced this file, e.g. 'mutation-harness-v1', 'gold-benchmark-2026-07-15'. Null until first run.

corpus_version.description: Version of the corpus (package.json version) at the time these metrics were measured. Null until first run.

benchmark_version.description: Version identifier for the benchmark suite that produced these metrics. Null until first run.

sample_size_total.description: Total number of samples across all rules used to compute the metrics in this file. Zero when no measurement has occurred.

rules.description: Map from rule identifier (postcondition id, typically '<package>-<rule-name>') to its measured metrics. Empty until measurement runs.

precision.description: Precision score for this rule: true positives / (true positives + false positives). Range [0, 1].

recall.description: Recall score for this rule: true positives / (true positives + false negatives). Range [0, 1].

sample_size.description: Number of samples (labeled instances or mutation-injected cases) used to compute precision and recall for this rule.

last_measured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent measurement for this rule.

source.description: How this metric was measured. 'mutation' = mutation-harness synthetic cases. 'gold' = human-labeled gold benchmark corpus (post-step-7).
